page.title: Settings
page.subtitle: Configure your UltraTorrent instance.
page.emptyDescription: This instance does not expose editable settings yet.
page.generalDescription: Values are validated by the server on save.

rootPath.title: Default Root Path
rootPath.description: Users can browse only inside this root path. Parent folders and system directories outside it are blocked.
rootPath.error: Could not load the root path.
rootPath.notWritableWarning: The app process cannot write to this path — downloads and folder creation there will fail.
rootPath.label: Root path

help.before: Must be a directory within the server's configured storage roots (
help.after: ). Browsing can only be narrowed within these, never widened past them.
